infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: CommunityBridge uses Face ID / Touch ID to help you securely sign in on this device.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CommunityBridge uses your location to support arrival detection and location-based features.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: CommunityBridge uses your location in the background to support arrival detection.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: CommunityBridge uses your location in the background to support arrival detection.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CommunityBridge needs camera access to let you capture photos for posts and messages.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CommunityBridge needs photo library access to let you choose images for posts and messages.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: CommunityBridge needs permission to save images to your photo library when you choose to download media.
